rationale: Plan-as-implemented is internally consistent with the registered meaning (verification half of retires only), the trust model (fail-closed closed sets, read-only allowlist oracle, zero-deps, sole merkle-dag/vendor import, no clotho), and its own explicit non-claims/deferrals. NORMATIVE surface is exactly the live populated #superseded plan-version set with closed shape, unique versions, must_not_govern_new_work===true, cycle-free termination at disk-resolved active_plan (canonicalize/sha256hex), and deterministic UNREPRESENTABLE/UNSUPPORTED short-circuits for the two empty/deferred surfaces. CHANGE-PROTOCOL/schema applicability tension is properly ruled and anchored (design-ruling artifact + peer resolution provenance) rather than papered over; no mutation path, no invented schema, no overclaim on completeness or write-proof. Honest deferred-ratification sequencing and post-build comprehension/contract activation gates match The Eye build-mode directive and leave no residual contradiction. Ratify AS-IS.
